CREATE TABLE test_strings (input_string String, length Int32, pad_string String DEFAULT ' ');
SELECT leftPadUTF8(input_string, length, pad_string) FROM test_strings;
SELECT LEFT_PADUTF8(input_string, length) AS padded FROM test_strings WHERE length > length(input_string);
SELECT leftPadUTF8(input_string, length) AS padded_string FROM test_strings WHERE pad_string = ' ' ORDER BY length DESC;
SELECT leftPadUTF8(substring(input_string, 1, 2), length, pad_string) FROM test_strings;
WITH (SELECT count(*) FROM test_strings WHERE pad_string IS NOT NULL) AS cnt SELECT leftPadUTF8(input_string, length, pad_string) FROM test_strings WHERE cnt > 1;
WITH (SELECT MAX(length) AS max_len FROM test_strings) SELECT leftPadUTF8('Example', max_len, ' ');
SELECT leftPadUTF8(CAST(NULL AS String), 5, '*') AS padded_null;
